name: CareRay Digital Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: CareRay Digital Medical Technology Co., Ltd. develops and produces digital X-ray flat panel detectors. The company offers wireless, wired, dynamic and breast flat panel, and industrial flat panel detectors, as well as accessories and tablet cases. Its products are used in medical, pet, security, and industrial imaging diagnostic products. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
